attributes.description: Alerts when `redis_up < 1`. Shard down triggers replica failover or reduces redundancy.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Shard down

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise shard down

### What fired
`redis_up < 1` on a shard during the window.

### Why it matters
A primary shard going down triggers failover; a replica going down reduces redundancy.

### Triage
1. Identify the role and node of the down shard.

### Remediation
- Recover shard or migrate to healthy node.

### Tuning
- Always P1 for primary shards.
